title: hedypnois glabra
intro: Hedypnois glabra, also known as smooth hedypnois, is a plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of hedypnois glabra include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory problems. Hedypnois glabra can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
